Here's what I found on centronias.com:

---

**Homepage content**

It's a minimal personal site. The full text:

> "Hello and welcome! This site used to be used as an 'e-business card', but as I am currently employed, it served only as a way for people to look up my name during the loading screen of League of Legends. Sources claim that using the same name for my domain and my online persona is a bad idea. I disregarded those sources' opinions."

Contact is shown as an image (`myEmailLink.png`) ...(truncated)
